MINI MINUTES:
APPEARANCES Via CourtCall:
Shaghig D. Agopian of BUTY & CURLIANO (510-267-3000), appearing for defendant and moving party Petrochem Insulation Inc.
Kimberly J. Chu of BRAYTON & PURCELL LLP (415-898-1555), appearing for plaintiff and opposing party Joseph Guillory.

RULING:
Hearing held, argued and tentative ruling adopted: Defendant Petrochem Insulation Inc.'s Motion for Summary Judgment is DENIED. Defendant failed to timely serve its motion under Code of Civil Procedure sections 437c(a)(2), 1010.6(a)(4)(B) and 12c. Order signed in open court. Judge: Cynthia Ming-mei Lee, Clerk: A. Mok. Not reported. (503/CML)
